name: split-flap
title: Split Flap
author: Parable
description: A Solari-board split-flap text display: mono ink cells riffle through a character set with a 3D half-flap (CSS perspective + rotateX) and settle left-to-right, animating whenever the text prop changes. Under prefers-reduced-motion it renders the final text instantly with no flips.

inspiredBy.name: Componentry — Split Flap Display (and Solari boards)
